title: astragalus hypoglottis
intro: Astragalus hypoglottis, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects, which enable it to stimulate the body's natural defense mechanisms and promote overall well-being. The health benefits of Astragalus hypoglottis include reducing stress and fatigue, improving immune function, and potentially lowering blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Astragalus hypoglottis can be prepared as a herbal supplement in capsule or tablet form, or as a decoction by steeping the dried roots in hot water to create a tea.
